design_philosophy.core_concept: A high-energy, dark-mode-first marketplace that captures the vibrancy of Syrian nightlife and modern commerce. The aesthetic is 'Cyber-Souq'—traditional warmth meeting digital precision.
design_philosophy.target_audience: Modern Syrian youth and families looking for trends and deals.

typography.rules: Use 'Cairo' for all Headings and UI elements. Use 'Almarai' for dense body text if needed. Text must be legible in RTL.

usage.buttons: Solid Primary Orange (#FF6B00) with Black Text for High Contrast CTA.
usage.backgrounds: Deepest Black (#050505) for main page, slightly lighter (#121212) for cards.
usage.text: Pure White for Headings, Zinc-400 for subtitles. NEVER use pure grey on black.

visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Scale 0.98 on click. Hover lifts y-1 with subtle orange glow.

layout_grid.bento_grid: Use CSS Grid with distinct span classes for 'Featured' vs 'Regular' items to break monotony.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF6B00] text-black hover:bg-[#E65000] rounded-full font-bold shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,107,0,0.3)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/5 hover:border-white/40 rounded-full font-medium transition-all

cards.product: bg-[#121212] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:border-[#FF6B00]/50 transition-colors group relative
cards.category: aspect-square rounded-full bg-[#1E1E1E] flex items-center justify-center border border-white/5 hover:bg-[#FF6B00] hover:text-black transition-all cursor-pointer

inputs.default: bg-[#0A0A0A] border-white/10 text-white placeholder:text-white/30 focus:border-[#FF6B00] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF6B00] rounded-lg h-12

navigation.mobile_nav: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-black/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-white/10 h-16 flex items-center justify-around z-50
navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-40 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-white/5

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, x: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, x: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, x: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}
motion.loader: animate-spin rounded-full h-8 w-8 border-t-2 border-[#FF6B00] border-r-2 border-transparent

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure #FF6B00 text is only used on dark backgrounds where contrast > 4.5. Use White for body text.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a visible focus ring using the primary color.
accessibility.rtl_check: Ensure margins and paddings are logical (ms-*, me-*) or standard (pl-*, pr-*) are flipped in the layout direction.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL: npm install framer-motion lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge
SETUP: Update tailwind.config.js with the custom colors defined above.
FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
RTL: Add dir='rtl' to the html tag in index.html.
LAYOUT: Build a Mobile-First layout. The Desktop view should use a max-width container to prevent stretching.
PWA: Ensure touch targets are at least 44px.
MOCK DATA: Create a distinct list of Syrian cities (Damascus, Aleppo, Homs, Latakia) for address forms.
PAYMENT: Create a simulated 'Cham Cash' modal that asks for a phone number and OTP.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for main backgrounds, only for subtle glows.
Spacing must be generous (p-6, p-8) even on mobile to feel premium.
Use Shadcn components but override the styles to match the 'Damascus Night' theme.
All prices should be formatted as 'SYP 25,000'.
